title: Device
description: Represents a database device (disk resource) on the SAP ASE server.

name.description: The logical name of the device.

physicalName.description: The physical file path of the device.

sizeMB.description: Total size of the device in megabytes.

usedMB.description: Space currently used on the device in megabytes.

deviceNumber.description: The numeric device identifier assigned by the server.
